rule: When non-OEM aftermarket crash parts are used in preparing a repair estimate, the written estimate must clearly identify each such part and include the required aftermarket crash parts disclosure.
applicability: Florida repair estimates prepared by an insurer, repair facility, or both, where nonoriginal equipment manufacturer aftermarket crash parts are used.
notes: Verified from the Florida Senate statute page during controlled staging rollout. This is claim intelligence support, not legal advice.

rule: A Pennsylvania motor vehicle physical damage appraisal that includes aftermarket crash parts must include the required aftermarket crash parts disclosure.
applicability: Pennsylvania motor vehicle physical damage appraisals involving aftermarket crash parts.
